scripts.dev:all: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d && npm run dev
scripts.dev:concurrent: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:windows: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev:backend:noreload" "npm run dev:frontend"
